title: Detection of the rearrangement of exons 9-12 of the BRCA1 gene with the use of multiplex PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3eitn","text":"In this protocol we developed a method for the detection of the rearrangement of exons 9-12 of BRCA1 based on multiplex PCR. ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":95,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cqncf","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5n29e","text":"A multiplex PCR is performed for the detection of the normal and mutated alleles of exons 9-12 of BRCA1 gene, 500 and 900 base pairs respectively, and a second PCR for the detection of the mutated allele. Both PCRs are observed by means of electrophoresis in 1.5% agarose gel.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":97,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"80el6","text":"1.- Wear clean gloves","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"avjap","text":"2.- Measure DNA concentration in nanodrop","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cb0da","text":"3.- Prepare aliquots of 50 ng / uL DNA","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"27cu3","text":"4.- Clean and disinfect the PCR cabinet","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fog26","text":"5.- Gently mix the DNA samples and pass the reagents briefly on the vortex","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3pui9","text":"6.-Centrifuge the DNA samples and reagents with a spin; 6- Keep reagents on ice","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"54if4","text":"7.- Leave microtubes ready for preparation of the mix, keep the same ones identified and on ice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6s0ne","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Note : This mix is to one reaction, you must consider how many reactions will be done. Add ultrapure water to microtube of each mix (two mixes). Mix one 14.1 µL ; Mix two 14.9 µL

- Add the oligonucleotides en each one mix: Add to mix one (B01del9-12, B02del9-12 and B03del9-12) , 1 µL, 10 pmol , 0.8 µL, 10 pmol , 1 µL, 10 pmol respectively; Add to mix two (B01del9-12, B03del9-12) 1 µL, 10 pmol , 1 µL, 10 pmol
- Add the Taq DNA polymerase to the mix. Briefly vortex and centrifuge for some seconds. 0.3 µL, 1.5 Units
- Add and aliquot of DNA sample to each tube 3 µL, 150 ng
- Close perfectly the tubes and centrifuge for some seconds
- Put the reaction in the thermocycler
Add 10x DreamTaq Buffer which includes MgCl2 at a concentration 20mM 3 µL
creator: Veronica Fragoso
